note: Browser-capture fixture. The Frick (Drupal) sits behind Yottaa anti-bot: every frick.org path — including /jsonapi — returns HTTP 418 to non-browser clients, so it can't be fetched by the importer. The browser passes the JS challenge and the page is server-rendered. CAPTURE METHOD: open https://www.frick.org/exhibitions in the connected browser, get_page_text, and record the entries under the UPCOMING heading (title + 'Month D, YYYY to Month D, YYYY' dates) here. parse_frick_capture keeps only future openings within the horizon, so out-of-horizon entries (e.g. 2027 openings) can be listed safely.

exhibitions.title: Kent Monkman: Officer and Laughing Girl
exhibitions.label: November 12, 2026 – February 22, 2027

exhibitions.title: Painting with Fire: Susanne de Court and the Art of Enamel
